title: ZSGreen x TH Colocalization Analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1cc9s","text":"Colocalization analysis of TH and ZSGreen using immunohistochemistry","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Going subregion at a time, use the event tool in Zen software to mark cells in which ZSGreen signal appears to be present in at least 50% of the cell as ZSGreen positive. ZSGreen signal should also be associated with a single nuclei shown with DAPI.
After identifying ZSGreen positive cells, use the event tool to mark any cells expressing TH and ZSGreen in a similar shape as double positive.
Counts are organized and percentages are calculated using Microsoft excel.
If a cell is on the border of a region the cell should be counted toward the region whichcontains at least 50% of the cell.
Identify and draw subregion borders on the image in Zen.
creator: Grace Kollman
